targets.query: from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cpu" and r._field == "usage_idle") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host == "telegraf") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: 100.0 - r._value }))

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mem" and r._field == "used") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host == "telegraf") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "load1") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "net" and (r._field == "bytes_recv" or r._field == "bytes_sent")) |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "diskio" and (r._field == "read_bytes" or r._field == "write_bytes")) |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_cpu" and r._field == "usage_percent") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container_name == "${service}" or "${service}" == "$__all") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_mem" and r._field == "usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container_name == "${service}" or "${service}" == "$__all") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_net" and (r._field == "rx_bytes" or r._field == "tx_bytes")) |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true) |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "platform_metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_mem" and r._field == "usage") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container_name == "${service}" or "${service}" == "$__all") |> last() |> group(columns: ["container_name", "container_id"])
